2.4.1. Microemulsion Particle Size, PDI, Zeta Potential Determination
The  particle  size,  polymer  dispersity  index  (PDI),  and  zeta  potential  of  the  micro-
emulsions were determined using a Zetasizer (Nano-ZS, Malvern Instruments, Worces-
tershire, UK) He/Ne laser with a scattering angle of 173°and a wavelength of 633 nm. The
microemulsions were diluted 30 times with deionized water and measured in quartz cu-
vettes and electrode cuvettes, respectively. The temperature was set at 25 ± 0.1 °C.
The stability of the obtained emulsion was investigated by centrifugation (GL-20B,
Shanghai Anting Scientiﬁc Instrument Factory, Shanghai, China). The prepared emulsion
was poured into a 25 mL centrifuge tube and then centrifuged at 5000× g for 5 min. The
particle  size  of  the  emulsion  before  and  after  centrifugation  was  determined  by  the
